patterns.desc: Driver has listeners but no onDeleted/onUninit cleanup.
NEVER combine measure_battery + alarm_battery. SDK v3 creates duplicate UI/Flow Cards. Use runtime adaptation via UnifiedBatteryHandler.
files: RESOLVED: 108 drivers had both caps, reverted to measure_battery only

patterns.desc: Bare getDeviceTriggerCard/getDeviceConditionCard/getDeviceActionCard crashes app if card missing in app.json. ALWAYS use try-catch.
files: RESOLVED: 23+ drivers wrapped in try-catch by fix-unsafe-flow-cards.js

patterns.desc: Chinese variants are too diverse for static compose. Same manufacturerName can be battery, mains, kinetic, hybrid. UnifiedBatteryHandler probes ALL sources (ZCL/DP/IAS/voltage) at runtime and adapts capabilities dynamically.
Battery DPs: 4,10,14,15,21,100,101,102,104,105 (%). Voltage DPs: 33,35,247 (mV). IAS Zone bit 3 = low-battery. ZCL genPowerCfg 0x0001 batteryPercentageRemaining div 2.

5 power types: Battery (measure_battery), Mains (mainsPowered=true, no battery caps), Hybrid (runtime detect), Kinetic/self-powered (TS004x, no battery), USB (treated as mains). NEVER assume from driver name.
4 protocol types: Tuya DP (TS0601/0xEF00), Standard ZCL (TS0001-TS0504), Tuya+ZCL (0xE000/0xE001 extensions), Custom (0xFC00-0xFCFF). NEVER mix: no ZCL bindings on TS0601, no EF00 on standard ZCL.

One manufacturerName maps to many productIds (normal). One productId (especially TS0601) maps to many manufacturerNames (normal). Same mfr+pid = MUST be same driver. Power source varies per variant - same _TZ3000_ can be battery OR mains OR kinetic.
Fingerprint in enrichment data uses UPPERCASE (e.g., _TZE200_PAY2BYAX). Tuya fingerprints must be lowercase to match correctly.
Missing removeAllListeners() cleanup to prevent memory leaks (sdk3-ondeleted-cleanup).
DP mapping has no variant-awareness comment. Same DP can serve different functions across _TZE200/_TZE204/_TZE284 variants. Consider adding variant notes.
